title: Dry Bulk Shipping - September 11, 2018
summary: Capesize rates at two-month lows - With a slowdown in fixing, Capesize rates touched ~18,000/day, their Atlantic Capesize cargo flow back to historical levels - Following a frenzy of fixing during late July, which We expect Capesize rates to find a bottom soon - We believe the roughly 35% correction in Capesize Year-to-date trade volumes remain relatively subdued - Iron ore imports to China remain flat and it is Fleet growth now above 2% for the year - Although average dry bulk rates are up more than 35% so far Short-term outlook neutral - With Capesize rates down closer to the year-to-date average, we believe the
